source_pr.title: statistics: add sync.Pool for bucket4Merging
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #46804

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

bucket4Merging is created at the ```MergePartitionHist2GlobalHist```. we should reuse it as soon as possible. Otherwise, it will impact the overall performance of TiDB.

Datum's clone and Datum's copy are actually different. If the object being assigned already has allocated memory, use Copy; if it is nil, use Clone. Clone will have an additional step of New(Datum), which is unnecessary.


### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)



Improve performance by 10% or more.


before:

```
$ go test -run=^$ -bench=BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist -benchmem github.com/pingcap/tidb/statistics
goos: darwin
goarch: arm64
pkg: github.com/pingcap/tidb/statistics
BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist/Size1000-8                      6         173566757 ns/op        68995968 B/op    1257932 allocs/op
BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist/Size10000-8                     1        3937835791 ns/op        839008792 B/op  15148761 allocs/op
BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist/Size100000-8                    1        121658261166 ns/op      8386240128 B/op 151412740 allocs/op
PASS
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/statistics      129.276s

```

after

```
$ go test -run=^$ -bench=BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist -benchmem github.com/pingcap/tidb/statistics
goos: darwin
goarch: arm64
pkg: github.com/pingcap/tidb/statistics
BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist/Size1000-8                     10         102124588 ns/op        42776989 B/op     570372 allocs/op
BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist/Size10000-8                     1        2335212542 ns/op        569181976 B/op   8180606 allocs/op
BenchmarkMergePartitionHist2GlobalHist/Size100000-8                    1        42539399791 ns/op       5669944600 B/op 81467581 allocs/op
PASS
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/statistics      48.796s

```


- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: + race = "on",.
analysis:
PR title: statistics: add sync.Pool for bucket4Merging
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/46803
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: + race = "on",
Changed files (2): statistics/handle/handletest/analyze/BUILD.bazel, statistics/histogram.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
